mapper.sql:
select dar.device_alert_record_id , shd.user_info_user_info_id_1 , dar.create_time , dar.alert_message , shd.smart_device_type_enum_smart_device_type_enum_id_1 , shd.is_on , dar.alert_type , shd.current_value , shd.room_name , shd.last_update_time , dar.smart_home_device_smart_device_id_1 , shd.device_name , shd.brightness , dar.is_resolved , shd.smart_device_status_enum_smart_device_status_enum_id_1 , dar.alert_level
FROM device_alert_record dar left join smart_home_device shd on dar.smart_home_device_smart_device_id_1 = shd.smart_device_id
mapper.select:
select dar.device_alert_record_id , shd.user_info_user_info_id_1 , dar.create_time , dar.alert_message , shd.smart_device_type_enum_smart_device_type_enum_id_1 , shd.is_on , dar.alert_type , shd.current_value , shd.room_name , shd.last_update_time , dar.smart_home_device_smart_device_id_1 , shd.device_name , shd.brightness , dar.is_resolved , shd.smart_device_status_enum_smart_device_status_enum_id_1 , dar.alert_level
FROM device_alert_record dar left join
smart_home_device
shd on dar.smart_home_device_smart_device_id_1 = shd.smart_device_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
